description: Adjust the final EPG trajectory structure by pruning, extending and otherwise modifying the branches to optimize for single-cell data
author: Ted Liefeld, UCSD School of Medicine.
plan:
## STREAM.EPGAdjustFinalGraph GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
STREAM.EPGAdjustFinalGraph is a GenePattern module that Adjust the final EPG trajectory structure by pruning, extending and otherwise modifying the branches to optimize for single-cell data

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 20 parameters:
- Required: data.file, epg.beta, figure.legend.num.columns, output.filename, epg.max.steps, incremental.number.of.nodes, epg.trimming.radius, component.x, component.y, num.components, epg.alpha, epg.lambda, epg.mu, epg.collapse.mode, epg.collapse.parameter, epg.extension.mode, epg.extension.parameter, epg.final.energy
- Optional: figure.width, figure.height

### 3. Command Line
```
python /stream/epg_adjustfinal_command_line.py -m <data.file> -of <output.filename> <figure.width> <figure.height> <figure.legend.num.columns> <component.x> <component.y> <num.components> <epg.max.steps>  <incremental.number.of.nodes> <epg.trimming.radius> <epg.alpha> -epg_n_processes <job.cpuCount>  <epg.lambda> <epg.mu> <epg.collapse.mode> <epg.collapse.parameter> <epg.extension.mode> <epg.extension.parameter> <epg.final.energy> <epg.beta>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/stream_epg_adjustfinal\:0.2

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: data.file
parameters.description: A STREAM pkl file containing gene expression data

parameters.name: epg.beta
parameters.description: Beta parameter of the penalized elastic energy.

parameters.name: figure.width
parameters.description: figure width

parameters.name: figure.legend.num.columns
parameters.description: The number of columns that the legend has.

parameters.name: figure.height
parameters.description: figure height

parameters.name: output.filename
parameters.description: output file name prefix

parameters.name: epg.max.steps
parameters.description: The maximum number of iteration steps.

parameters.name: incremental.number.of.nodes
parameters.description: Incremental number of nodes for elastic principal graph.

parameters.name: epg.trimming.radius
parameters.description: epg_trimmingradius\: `float`, optional (default\: 'Inf')

parameters.name: component.x
parameters.description: Component used for x axis in plots.

parameters.name: component.y
parameters.description: Component used for y axis in plots.

parameters.name: num.components
parameters.description: Number of components to be plotted.

parameters.name: epg.alpha
parameters.description: Alpha parameter of the penalized elastic energy.

parameters.name: epg.lambda
parameters.description: Lambda parameter used to compute the elastic energy.

parameters.name: epg.mu
parameters.description: Mu parameter used to compute the elastic energy.

parameters.name: epg.collapse.mode
parameters.description: The mode used to prune the graph.Choose from {{'PointNumber','PointNumber_Extrema','PointNumber_Leaves','EdgesNumber','EdgesLength'}}. 'PointNumber'\: branches with less than epg_collapse_par points (points projected on the extreme points are not considered) are removed; 'PointNumber_Extrema', branches with less than epg_collapse_par (points projected on the extreme points are not considered) are removed;  'PointNumber_Leaves', branches with less than epg_collapse_par points (points projected on non-leaf extreme points are not considered) are removed.

parameters.name: epg.collapse.parameter
parameters.description: The paramter used to control different modes.

parameters.name: epg.extension.mode
parameters.description: The mode used to extend the leaves.  Choose from {{'QuantDists','QuantCentroid','WeigthedCentroid'}}; 'QuantCentroid'\:for each leaf node, the extreme points are ordered by their distance from the node and the centroid of the points further than epg_ext_par is returned; 'WeigthedCentroid'\:for each leaf node, a weight is computed for each points by raising the distance to the epg_ext_par power. Larger epg_ext_par results in a bigger influence of points further than the node; 'QuantDists'\:for each leaf node, the extreme points are ordered by their distance from the node and the 100*epg_ext_par th percentile of the points farther than epg_ext_par is returned.

parameters.name: epg.extension.parameter
parameters.description: The paramter used to control different modes.

parameters.name: epg.final.energy
parameters.description: Indicate the final elastic energy associated with the configuration.
